CustomField.description: Effective Escalation is set based on the Escalation percentage that is set on the Supplemental Rent page. If the MR Rate Schedule is presented, Effective Escalation copies the values from there(The Esc percentage can be overridden in the MR Rate Schedule)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Effective Escalation is set based on the Escalation percentage that is set on the Supplemental Rent page. If the MR Rate Schedule is presented, Effective Escalation copies the values from there(The Esc percentage can be overridden in the MR Rate Schedule)
CustomField.label: Effective Escalation
